creator: basarevych@gmail.com
text:
Some of the options in devel/geany-plugins are marked as "(broken)" and disabled by default.

Currently, at least on 8.2, only two such plugins are marked. I've tried to build the port with the default options unchanged and many plugins failed. Had to manually disable options one by one to install the port.

I propose disabling all the options that are broken in current geany version.

The plugins that where successfully build and loaded are: treebrowser codenav pretty-printer geanydoc geanyvc. All the others are broken.

Fix: 

Uncheck:
GEANY_ADDONS
GEANY_GEANYLATEX
GEANY_GEANYLIPSUM
GEANY_GEANYPRJ
GEANY_GEANYSENDMAIL
GEANY_SHIFTCOLUMN
GEANY_SPELLCHECK
GEANY_INSERTNUM
GEANY_GEANYEXTRASEL
How-To-Repeat: Build devel/geany-plugins
